pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 24 references get_channel_id "LIS_ACK_Normalizer"; task.json description confirms channel name
verifier.py line 95-96 attempts connection to localhost:6661; task.json description states 'from TCP port 6661'
setup_task.sh line 36 defines PORT = 6662 for mock_lis_server.py; task.json description states 'to a legacy system on localhost port 6662'
setup_task.sh line 102 removes ack_audit.log; export_result.sh line 11 checks /home/ga/ack_audit.log; verifier.py line 139 copies /home/ga/ack_audit.log; task.json description states audit file path
setup_task.sh line 11 creates /home/ga/documents/sample_adt.hl7 with HL7 ADT message content; task.json description references this path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic HL7 healthcare integration scenario. The channel 'LIS_ACK_Normalizer' receives HL7 ADT (Admission/Discharge/Transfer) messages on port 6661, forwards them to a mock legacy LIS system on port 6662, and normalizes defective ACK (Acknowledgment) messages that lack required text descriptions. Raw ACKs are logged to /home/ga/ack_audit.log for audit compliance. The sample ADT message file is created at /home/ga/documents/sample_adt.hl7 during setup.
